mapper.select: select * from app_b_user t1 where t1.id=#{userId} for update
SELECT COUNT(1) indentCount FROM app_b_user AS a LEFT JOIN app_indent AS b ON a.id = b.user_b_id WHERE a.id = #{userId} AND (b.state = 3 OR b.state =4 OR b.state = 5 OR b.state = 6)
SELECT format(SUM(price)*0.8,2) FROM app_spray_paint_indent WHERE technician_id = #{id} AND (state = 8 or state = 9) AND to_days(create_time) = to_days(now())
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_spray_paint_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (state = 3 OR state = 6);

SELECT SUM(aou) count FROM( SELECT COUNT(1) aou FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (indent_state = 3 or indent_state = 6) union ALL SELECT COUNT(1) aou FROM app_spray_paint_indent WHERE technician_id = #{bMessageid} AND (state = 8 or state = 9) union ALL SELECT COUNT(1) aou FROM app_rescue_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (state = 3 or state = 5) union all SELECT COUNT(1) aou FROM app_year_check_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (state = 3 or state = 5) ) t

SELECT SUM(todayEar) FROM( select SUM(settle_accounts) todayEar from app_indent where to_days(creat_time) = to_days(now()) and user_b_id = #{user_b_id} AND (state = 3 or state = 6) union all SELECT format(SUM(price)*0.8,2) todayEar FROM app_year_check_indent WHERE to_days(create_time) = to_days(now()) and user_b_id = #{user_b_id} AND state = 6 ) t
SELECT format(SUM(amount)*0.9,2) FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (indent_state = 3 or indent_state = 6) AND to_days(create_time) = to_days(now())
SELECT id,merchants_name merchantsName,score,type FROM app_b_user WHERE id = #{userBId}

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT partner_trade_no id,concat('余额提现')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,concat('-',amount)amount,concat(1)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m') operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_wx_cash_out_record WHERE sources =2 and user_id = #{userBId} UNION ALL SELECT out_trade_no id,concat('账户充值')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,concat('+',amount/100)amount,concat(2)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m') operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_wxpay_order WHERE (type = 2 OR type = 3) AND user_id = #{userBId} AND status = 2 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('视频扣款')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,concat('-',deduction)amount,concat(3)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userBId} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('订单结算')operationName,order_number orderNumber,format(concat('-',fixloss_user),2)amount,concat(4)type,date_format(creat_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,creat_time createTime FROM app_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 6 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('洗车结算')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,format(CONCAT('+',amount*0.9),2)amount,concat(5)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (indent_state = 3 or indent_state = 6) AND contract_flag <> 1 and resource = 1 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('美容结算')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,format(CONCAT('+',amount*0.9),2)amount,concat(6)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (indent_state = 3 or indent_state = 6) and resource = 2 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('救援结算')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,format(CONCAT('+',price*0.8),2)amount,concat(7)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_rescue_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state= 6 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('喷漆结算')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,format(CONCAT('+',price*0.8),2)amount,concat(8)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_spray_paint_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (state = 3 or state = 6) UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('年检结算')operationName,concat('') orderNumber,format(CONCAT('+',price*0.8),2)amount,concat(9)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_year_check_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state =6 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('代驾结算')operationName,concat('')orderNumber,format(CONCAT('+',actual_price),2)amount,concat(10)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_substitute_driving_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (indent_state = 6 or indent_state = 7) ) t ORDER BY t.createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
SELECT SUM(amount)/100 income FROM app_wxpay_order WHERE (type = 2 or type = 3) AND user_id = #{userBId} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{operationMonth} AND status = 2
SELECT SUM(price)*0.8 FROM app_rescue_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 6 AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{operationMonth}

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT partner_trade_no id,concat('余额提现')operationName,concat('-',amount)amount,concat(1)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m') operationMonth FROM app_wx_cash_out_record WHERE sources =2 and user_id = #{userBId} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{date} UNION ALL SELECT out_trade_no id,concat('账户充值')operationName,concat('+',amount/100)amount,concat(2)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m') operationMonth FROM app_wxpay_order WHERE (type = 2 OR type = 3) AND status = 2 AND user_id = #{userBId} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{date} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('视频扣款')operationName,concat('-',deduction)amount,concat(3)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userBId} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{date} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('订单结算')operationName,concat('-',fixloss_user)amount,concat(4)type,date_format(creat_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,creat_time createTime FROM app_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND DATE_FORMAT(creat_time,'%Y-%m') = #{date} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('洗车结算')operationName,format(CONCAT('+',amount*0.9),2)amount,concat(5)type,date_format(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (indent_state = 3 or indent_state = 6) AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{date} AND contract_flag <> 1 ) t ORDER BY t.operationMonth DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
SELECT brand_id FROM app_merchants_brand WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 1
SELECT `name` FROM app_up_merchants WHERE id = #{member}
mapper.update: update app_up_merchants set unread_message = 0 where id= #{userBId}
mapper.select: SELECT headImg avatar, wxname name, phone phoneNumber from biz_wx_user WHERE openid = #{wxuserId}
